/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MasterRepoRuntime.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MasterRepoRuntime.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o MasterRepoRuntime  libNovaForgeApp.a ../World/libNovaForgeWorld.a ../Save/libNovaForgeSave.a ../UI/libNovaForgeUI.a ../../Atlas/Editor/libAtlasEditor.a ../Integrations/AtlasAI/libNovaForgeIntegrationAtlasAI.a ../../Atlas/Runtime/libAtlasRuntime.a ../../Atlas/Engine/libAtlasEngine.a ../../Atlas/Core/libAtlasCore.a
